HomePage.title: TaskFlow - workspaces for teams and tasks
HomePage.description: Organize work in spaces with boards, canvases, teams, roles, and tasks.

hero.heading: Keep work together in shared
hero.subtitle: TaskFlow brings workspaces, boards, canvases, teams, access roles, and tasks into one product, so projects do not live in disconnected work areas.

features.heading: Features that show product and architecture depth
features.subheading: The strongest pieces come first: permissions, offline/realtime, security, and collaboration.

workspaces.title: Workspace shell
workspaces.desc: A workspace keeps boards, teams, members, invites, my tasks, and settings inside one product shell.

boards.title: Kanban boards
boards.desc: Columns and tasks support drag and drop, quick actions, deep-link highlighting, and persisted ordering.

teams.title: Teams and members
teams.desc: Group workspace members into teams and assign tasks to the right person or discipline.

permissions.title: Unified permissions
permissions.desc: Workspace and board roles are enforced in REST, WebSocket, and UI while viewers stay fully read-only.

templates.title: Ready starting points
templates.desc: Create empty boards or Scrum workflows with useful columns, welcome tasks, and a clear structure.

views.title: Filters and saved views
views.desc: Search tasks, filter by assignee, team, priority, and status, then save the views your team uses most.

realtime.title: Realtime with ack/rollback
realtime.desc: Socket.IO syncs tasks, comments, activity, and notifications while the client waits for server ack.

whiteboards.title: Collaborative WebGL canvases
whiteboards.desc: Canvases live inside a workspace, attach to boards, and support realtime drawing, notes, cursors, and PNG export.

analytics.title: Task analytics
analytics.desc: Track completed tasks by day, week, and month, including on-time and late completion summaries.

pendingChanges.title: Persisted offline queue
pendingChanges.desc: Task update/move/reorder survives refresh with TTL, idempotency keys, and clear conflict states.

auth.title: Secure sessions
auth.desc: JWT lives in httpOnly cookies, refresh tokens rotate, reuse revokes sessions, and WS gets a separate token.

pwa.title: PWA and offline cache
pwa.desc: The Service Worker caches app shell and HTML/RSC routes while TanStack Query persists board data in IndexedDB.

invites.title: Public invite links
invites.desc: Invite preview works before sign-in, the token survives login/register, and accepted invites land in the audit log.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: The notification bell tracks unread mentions, assignments, board access, and team task changes in realtime.

taskDetails.title: Richer task details
taskDetails.desc: Tasks support checklists, attachments, links, labels, estimates, story points, due dates, and assignees.

comments.title: Comments and mentions
comments.desc: Task discussion syncs across open windows, mentions are scoped to board members, and create notifications.

activity.title: Board activity log
activity.desc: History captures task, column, and member changes, displays old → new values, and can jump back to a task.

mobile.title: Mobile board
mobile.desc: Phones get a compact board flow with card actions that do not depend on the desktop drag-and-drop layout.

demo.title: Showcase demo
demo.desc: One button opens a prepared demo workspace with teams, roles, tasks, canvases, saved views, and a safe reset flow.

filesProfile.title: Profile and files
filesProfile.desc: Avatars and attachments pass type/size validation and use a StorageAdapter: local, Cloudinary, or ImageKit.

HomePage.footer: TaskFlow - Next.js · NestJS · Zustand · Material UI
